svg.text: Pi 4B · DM542T · NEMA 23 + 10:1 Gearbox · 24V DC | 2× Pi Zero 2 W cameras + kart sensor node | Relay module + linear actuator for door
Pi GND must be common with DM542T GND
kart_door: open → blocks move or faults
SW1–SW4: set RMS current for motor
ENA− tied low: motor enabled by default
ENA+ HIGH = disabled LOW = holding torque
Swap A+/A− if motor turns wrong direction
── SYSTEM GND BUS — common to Pi 4B · DM542T · 24V PSU ──
All Pi 4B safety switches NC to GND — pin HIGH = fault or broken wire = STOP
100µF 50V cap mandatory across DM542T V+/GND — prevents back-EMF spike
Kart door NC switch: open during transit → immediate motor stop + FAULT state
Add BSS138 level-shifter if steps missed
Pi 4B GND common with DM542T + PSU GND
Kart Pi Zero 2 W: solar powered, no mains
Landing Pi Zero 2 W: 5V micro-USB each
Linear actuator: 12V separate supply on kart
Relay GPIO5/6 are kart Pi Zero pins only
